text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Look at you two, standing around looking
all serious—what's the big deal?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's just, I was chatting with Ruby at that
corner over there...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
When another student happened to run by and
crash into us. We both had a tumble... Ruby, are
you hurt?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text: No, I'm quite all right. No need to worry.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well then consider yourselves lucky, 'cause
Magical Girl Sweepy is here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Twinkle, twinkle, little boo-boo, how I wish you
would go shoo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
May I inquire as to the meaning of... that just
now?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Couldn't you tell? ♪ I cast a spell on you to make
the pain go away. Well? I bet you don't feel a
thing anymore, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're right. Thank you for the charming
spell, Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, if you ever need anything, me and my
magic are always ready to save the day. ♪
